headline: Transcript: Arm enters the AI race
summary: Sonja Hutson talks to Mehul Srivastava and Tim Bradshaw
body_text:
This is an audio transcript of the FT News Briefing podcast episode: ‘Arm enters the AI race’

Sonja Hutson Good morning from the Financial Times. Today is Wednesday, October 30th. And this is your FT News Briefing.

Google is riding high on the cloud these days. And Israel passed legislation that could prevent UN aid from reaching Gaza. Plus, the tech group Arm conquered the world of cell phone chip design. Now it’s coming for AI.

Tim Bradshaw Everyone wants to get out from underneath Nvidia’s thumb.

Sonja Hutson I’m Sonja Hutson, and here’s the news you need to start your day.

[MUSIC PLAYING]

Artificial intelligence and big tech have been a match made in heaven these last few years. We got the latest indication of that yesterday from Google’s parent company, Alphabet. It reported a 34 per cent jump in profits last quarter, and it attributed much of that success to strong growth in cloud computing. You see, there’s a lot of demand for the data services that are used to train and r
